content:
<act>
<tool>graph.plan</tool>
<objective>Deliver the owner task by improving semantic recursive documentation for Qwen, Minecraft, Windows, Japan, United States topics while maintaining neutral multi-state progress tracking.</objective>
<constraints>1. Evidence must be collected before plan admission; 2. Document structure audit required before artifact writes; 3. Recovery phase requires repeat-recovery validation; 4. No direct owner communication until completion gate passes</constraints>
<assumptions>1. Owner task scope is bounded to four documented topics; 2. Existing document fragments exist in structured-output root; 3. Memory contains prior cycle lessons for policy reference; 4. Graph state machine requires sequential evidence collection</assumptions>
<risks>1. Premature artifact writes before document audit; 2. Missing normalizer tests causing param-reliability gaps; 3. Recovery ladder step=5 may require alternative tool paths; 4. Stale memory rows could corrupt policy layers</risks>
<steps>1. Collect observation evidence from structured-output root; 2. Record plan with required fields and confidence bounds; 3. Execute document-structure audit via doc.audit; 4. Build artifact scaffold using artifact.plan then apply; 5. Verify semantic consistency across Qwen/Minecraft/Windows/Japan/US documents</steps>
<checks>1. Evidence completeness: plan, observation, document-structure present; 2. Document topology passes doc.audit count threshold; 3. Artifact batch writes succeed with mode=approx; 4. Recovery ladder step does not exceed limit=5</checks>
<path>structured-output</path>
<reason>Recovery phase requires structured plan before any tool mutation to ensure evidence completeness and prevent blocked-step failures from repeated graph.recover attempts.</reason>
</act>
